ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Email address of the creator */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was created */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the component */,
  "component_names" TEXT /* Names of the components as used in the BIM model */,
  "ext_system" INTEGER /* ID of the external system from which the component originates (e.g., Autodesk Revit) */,
  "ext_object" INTEGER /* ID of the external object type (e.g., ElectricalSystem) */,
  "ext_identifier" TEXT /* External identifier for the component in the external system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Current version number of the component */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., active, deprecated, draft) */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Email address of the user who last updated the component */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the component is primarily used (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_ext_system FOREIGN KEY ("ext_system") REFERENCES external_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_ext_object FOREIGN KEY ("ext_object") REFERENCES external_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Email address of the user who created the category */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Email address of the user who last updated the category */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the component */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file containing the component version */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Email address of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Email address of the user who last updated the project */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the component is used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was used in the project */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of times the component was used in the project */,
  "usage_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the usage (e.g., specific tasks or phases) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, engineer, project manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the component */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the component (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_access_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the external system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the external system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external system */,
  "last_synced_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last synchronization with the external system */,
  "sync_status" TEXT /* Status of the last synchronization (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external object type */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external system providing the object type */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the external object type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external object type */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Email address of the user who last updated the object */,
  "last_updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that has dependencies */,
  "dependent_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that is depended upon */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., spatial, functional) */,
  "dependency_description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "criticality" TEXT /* Level of criticality of the dependency (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_dependent_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component with the issue */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Email address of the user who reported the issue */,
  "reported_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was reported */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Email address of the user assigned to resolve the issue */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details of the resolution once the issue is closed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_issues_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue this comment is related to */,
  "commented_by" TEXT /* Email address of the user who commented */,
  "commented_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment resolved the issue */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details of the resolution provided in the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES component_issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change in history */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that was changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Email address of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_on" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file containing the component version at the time of the change */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the file at the time of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_history_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
